title: metalasia umbelliformis
intro: Metalasia umbelliformis, also known as the umbrella metalasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Metalasia umbelliformis is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically to the skin for its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
